SEARCH
Package org.ddolib.common.solver.stat

Class SearchStatistics

java.lang.Object
org.ddolib.common.solver.stat.SearchStatistics
Direct Known Subclasses:
AstarStats, DdoStats
public abstract class SearchStatistics extends Object
Class representing the statistics of a search process in a solver.

This class tracks various metrics such as runtime, number of iterations, incumbent value, and optimality gap. It is designed to be immutable-like, where update methods return a new instance with the updated value.

It represents the search statistics of a solver. Subclasses override the update methods to return their specific type via covariant return types.

  • Constructor Details

    • SearchStatistics

      public SearchStatistics(long startTime, double initValue)
      Constructs a new SearchStatistics instance.
      Parameters:
      startTime - the start time of the search (in milliseconds)
      initValue - the initial value for the incumbent

  • Method Details

    • createSpecificInstance

      protected abstract SearchStatistics createSpecificInstance()
      Creates a new instance of the specific subclass with initial values. This is used by the copy method to maintain the correct type.
      Returns:
      a new instance of the specific subclass

    • lastTimeOfImprovement

      public long lastTimeOfImprovement()
      Returns the time at which the last improvement was found.
      Returns:
      the last time of improvement (in milliseconds)

    • runtime

      public long runtime()
      Returns the total runtime of the search.
      Returns:
      the runtime (in milliseconds)

    • currentTime

      public long currentTime()
      Returns the current time recorded in these statistics.
      Returns:
      the current time (in milliseconds)

    • nbIterations

      public int nbIterations()
      Returns the total number of iterations performed by the search.
      Returns:
      the number of iterations

    • lastIterationOfImprovement

      public int lastIterationOfImprovement()
      Returns the iteration number during which the last improvement was found.
      Returns:
      the last iteration of improvement

    • lastIterationOfGapImprovement

      public int lastIterationOfGapImprovement()
      Returns the iteration number during which the last gap improvement was found.
      Returns:
      the last iteration of gap improvement

    • gap

      public double gap()
      Returns the current optimality gap.
      Returns:
      the gap (percentage)

    • incumbent

      public double incumbent()
      Returns the value of the best solution found so far (incumbent).
      Returns:
      the incumbent value

    • prevIncumbent

      public double prevIncumbent()
      Returns the value of the previous incumbent found before the current one.
      Returns:
      the previous incumbent value

    • status

      public SearchStatus status()
      Returns the current status of the search.
      Returns:
      the SearchStatus

    • frontierMaxSize

      public int frontierMaxSize()
      Returns the maximum size reached by the search frontier during the process.
      Returns:
      the maximum frontier size

    • relativeImprovement

      public double relativeImprovement()
      Returns the relative improvement of the last incumbent update in percent.
      Returns:
      the relative improvement in percent

    • copy

      public SearchStatistics copy()
      Creates and returns a copy of this statistics instance.
      Returns:
      a copy of the current statistics

    • updateIncumbent

      public SearchStatistics updateIncumbent(double incumbent, double gap)
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated incumbent value and gap.
      Parameters:
      incumbent - the new incumbent value
      gap - the new optimality gap
      Returns:
      a new instance with updated incumbent and gap

    • updateStatus

      public SearchStatistics updateStatus(SearchStatus status)
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated search status.
      Parameters:
      status - the new SearchStatus
      Returns:
      a new instance with the updated status

    • incrementNbIter

      public SearchStatistics incrementNbIter()
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with the iteration count incremented by one.
      Returns:
      a new instance with incremented iterations

    • updateFrontierMaxSize

      public SearchStatistics updateFrontierMaxSize(int frontierSize)
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated maximum frontier size.
      Parameters:
      frontierSize - the current frontier size to potentially update the maximum
      Returns:
      a new instance with the updated maximum frontier size

    • updateGap

      public SearchStatistics updateGap(double gap)
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated optimality gap.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      a new instance with the updated gap

    • updateTime

      public SearchStatistics updateTime(long time)
      Returns a new SearchStatistics instance with an updated current time.
